title: senecio niveoaureus
intro: Senecio niveoaureus, also known as Golden Groundsel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Senecio niveoaureus include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and exhibiting potential antiseptic properties. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the leaves and flowers, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
